## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.10

### WebRTC
- Reconnects the X-Sense signaling socket when the camera sends `PEER_OUT` before returning an SDP answer.
- Keeps the existing retry path for normal signaling socket closes before an answer.
- Adds reconnect reason details to WebRTC debug logging.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the no-second-`PEER_IN` case seen in camera live-view logs.
- Keeps coverage for the existing retry path where a later `PEER_IN` arrives after `PEER_OUT`.
